title: 2026 AI Engineer Vibe Reel
summary: The AI Engineer channel is promoting a World's Fair event in San Francisco scheduled for June 29 to July 2, 2026. The announcement invites viewers to get tickets and view the schedule at ai.engineer/wf.
writeup: This video from the AI Engineer channel promotes the AI Engineer World's Fair, scheduled for June 29 to July 2, 2026, in San Francisco. It invites viewers to purchase tickets and review the event schedule. The takeaway is the confirmed dates and location for the next World's Fair, with registration and program details available now.
